zh.lifeSummary: 當Béatrix de Guines於1142年出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯i斯時，她的父親Arnould de Guisnes I Comte Gand40歲，母親Maud St Omer32歲。她和Hughes de Beaumetz至少有1個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於1174年在法國帕-德-卡拉斯阿拉斯波奧梅-利斯-洛格斯享年32歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Guines
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Perhaps an altered form of Irish Guinness, a shortened form of McGinnis . This surname is found predominantly in TX.

variants.name: McGinnis
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mag Aonghuis or Mag Aonghusa ‘son of Aonghus’ (see Angus ). This is the surname of a chieftain family in western County Down. Compare the Scottish form McInnis , and the variant McNeese . Compare also McGuinness .

nameMeanings.name: Béatrix
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Late Latin personal name, which was borne by a saint martyred in Rome, together with Saints Faustinus and Simplicius, in the early 4th century. The original form of the name was probably Viatrix, a feminine version of Viator ‘voyager (through life)’, which was a favourite name among early Christians. This was then altered by association with Latin Beatus ‘blessed’ (Via- and Bea- sometimes being pronounced the same in Late Latin). See also Beatrice .

en.lifeSummary: When Béatrix de Guines was born in 1142, in Guînes, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, her father, Arnould de Guisnes I Comte Gand, was 40 and her mother, Maud St Omer, was 32. She had at least 1 son and 3 daughters with Hughes de Beaumetz. She died in 1174, in Beaumetz-lès-Loges, Arras, Pas-de-Calais, France, at the age of 32.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Béatrix de Guines est née en 1142, à Guînes, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, Arnould de Guisnes I Comte Gand, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Maud St Omer, avait 32 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles avec Hughes de Beaumetz. Elle est décédée en 1174, à Beaumetz-lès-Loges, Arras, Pas-de-Calais, France, à l’âge de 32 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Béatrix de Guines 1142 in Guînes, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Arnould de Guisnes I Comte Gand 40 und ihre Mutter Maud St Omer 32. Sie hatte mit Hughes de Beaumetz mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1174 im Alter von 32 Jahren in Beaumetz-lès-Loges, Arras, Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Béatrix de Guines è nata il nel 1142 nel Guînes, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, sua padre, Arnould de Guisnes I Comte Gand, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Maud St Omer, aveva 32 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie con Hughes de Beaumetz. Morì nel 1174, nel Beaumetz-lès-Loges, Arras, Pas-de-Calais, Francia, all'età di 32 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Béatrix de Guinesが1142年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスグiンスで生まれた時，父Arnould de Guisnes I Comte Gandは40歳，母Maud St Omerは32歳であった。彼女はHughes de Beaumetzとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1174年にフランスプアス-デ-カレイスアラスビーウメトズ-ルeス-ロジェズで32歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Béatrix de Guines(이)가 1142년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 구i네스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Arnould de Guisnes I Comte Gand(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maud St Omer(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 Hughes de Beaumetz(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1174년 프랑스 파스-데-캘레이 아라스 보멧즈-e스-로그스에서 32세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Béatrix de Guines родилась в 1142 г. в местности гуiнесь, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, её отцу по имени Arnould de Guisnes I Comte Gand было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud St Omer, 32. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери от Hughes de Beaumetz. Она умерла в 1174 г. в местности бомец-лeс-логесь, аррас, пас-де-калеи, Франция в возрасте 32 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Béatrix de Guines nació en 1142, en Guînes, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, su papá, Arnould de Guisnes I Comte Gand, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Maud St Omer, tenía 32 años.
